uplink.description: heartbeat upload with GPS fix (upstream example input)
uplink._note: Upstream example input. expected.data authored to the normalized vocabulary; lat/lon verified by running reference/upstream-codec.js (longitude 116.507430, latitude 40.038999), rounded to the device 1e-6 resolution. Upstream `battery` is a low-battery boolean (not volts) -> batteryLow extra.

uplink.description: heartbeat upload with GPS fix (synthetic, southern/eastern hemisphere)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame: lat/lon float32 bytes encoded for ~Sydney (lat -33.865, lon 151.2093) then oracle-decoded by reference/upstream-codec.js (latitude -33.865002, longitude 151.209308) and rounded to 1e-6. Exercises a negative latitude, the low-battery flag set, and a non-zero frame counter.

uplink.description: heartbeat upload without GPS (17-byte frame, no position)
uplink._note: Upstream example input. No on-board GPS fix in the 17-byte heartbeat, so no position.* is emitted. Values verified against reference/upstream-codec.js (level 15 mm, temperature 25 C).

uplink.description: parameter report (interval + empty alarm threshold, no position)
uplink._note: Upstream example input (25-byte frame with bytes[3]==0x03). Verified against reference/upstream-codec.js (1 minute interval, 30 cm empty-alarm threshold).
Only fPort 3 carries DF530 application data.
DF530 frames are 17 or 25 bytes; anything else is rejected.
